response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and has a current career gap — raising concerns about recent AI-specific depth and continuity.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation
Proven full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tools (AWS CDK)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership through workshops and platforms
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems or RAG/vector DB implementation
Current career gap since October 2025 undermines recent technical momentum
Limited documentation of cloud-native AI system design or evaluation/observability pipelines
